summary: Completed frontend E2E testing for audit fixes P0-1 through P3-9. All primary audit fixes (AR Receipt flow, cash routing hints, void functionality, incentive rates dropdown, costing margin label) are working correctly. RBAC testing encountered test environment issues preventing full verification of sales user restrictions.

rbac_verification_incomplete.issue: Unable to fully verify sales user RBAC due to test environment login flow issues. Quick login buttons and manual login both failed to establish sales user session in isolated test. However, navigationConfig.js shows correct role filtering: PEMBELIAN group roles=['admin','manager','warehouse'] and ADMIN group roles=['admin'] - both correctly exclude 'sales'.
rbac_verification_incomplete.notes: Configuration appears correct in code. May be a test environment issue or session management issue. Recommend main agent verify sales user login flow and RBAC filtering manually or with backend validation.

P3-9: Costing Margin Label - Footnote explaining catalog margin (pre-discount) present
P3-9: Incentive Rates Entity Dropdown - Entity field is a KNSelect dropdown (not text input)
P3-9: Incentive Rates Entity Dropdown - 'Semua entitas (all)' option available in dropdown
P0-1: AR Receipt Modal - Cash routing hint displays correctly for Transfer Bank method ('Kas Besar')
P0-1: AR Receipt Modal - Cash routing hint changes correctly for Tunai method ('Kas Kecil')
P0-1: AR Receipt Modal - Payment submission in Otomatis (FIFO) mode successful
P0-1: AR Receipt Modal - Modal closes after successful payment submission
P0-1: AR Receipt Modal - Success notice appears after payment submission
P2-6: AR Receipt Void - Void button visible for Posted receipts (admin role)
P2-6: AR Receipt Void - Receipt status changes from 'Posted' to 'Void' after void action
P2-6: AR Receipt Void - Success notice appears after void action
P2-5: AR Receipt Deposit - Deposit box logic implemented (shows only when customer has deposit balance)
action_item_for_main_agent: RBAC Verification: Please manually verify sales user (sales@kainnusantara.id / demo12345) login and confirm that: (1) PEMBELIAN group is NOT visible in sidebar, (2) ADMIN & MASTER DATA group is NOT visible in sidebar, (3) Sales Home does not display HPP/WAC cost terms. The navigationConfig.js role filtering appears correctly configured, but automated testing encountered login session issues preventing full verification. All other audit fixes (P0-1, P2-5, P2-6, P3-9) are confirmed working.
